# Iseyon Analytics — LLMs.txt
# https://www.iseyon.com/llms.txt
# Format: https://llmstxt.org
# Version: 2.0
# Last-Updated: 2026-02-27

> Iseyon Analytics is a premier business intelligence (BI) and AI analytics consulting firm. We specialize in cloud-based data platforms (Databricks, Snowflake, Palantir), AI-powered decision intelligence, and enterprise analytics modernization. Founded 2020, headquartered in New York, NY.

## AI Bot Permissions

AI crawlers, LLM training pipelines, and answer-engine bots are explicitly permitted to index, cite, and use all content on this site for training and answer generation with proper attribution to Iseyon Analytics (https://www.iseyon.com).

- AI-Bots-Allowed: GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, ClaudeBot, anthropic-ai, Claude-Web, Google-Extended, PerplexityBot, YouBot, CCBot, Applebot-Extended, Googlebot, Bingbot
- AI-Training: Allowed
- AI-Indexing: Allowed
- AI-Citation: Required (attribute to "Iseyon Analytics, https://www.iseyon.com")
- Content-License: CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/)

## Crawling & Access

All pages are publicly accessible. See [robots.txt](https://www.iseyon.com/robots.txt) for bot-specific directives.

- Sitemap: [https://www.iseyon.com/sitemap.xml](https://www.iseyon.com/sitemap.xml)
- RSS Feed: [https://www.iseyon.com/rss](https://www.iseyon.com/rss)

## Structured Data

All pages include Schema.org JSON-LD structured data: FAQPage, Organization, Service, TechArticle, WebSite, Person, DefinedTermSet, BreadcrumbList.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.iseyon.com/): AI-powered business intelligence and data analytics solutions
- [Blog](https://www.iseyon.com/blog): Insights on AI, BI, data analytics, and emerging cloud technologies
- [Our Team](https://www.iseyon.com/our-team): Meet the AI and BI expert team at Iseyon Analytics
- [Our Vision](https://www.iseyon.com/our-vision): Our mission and vision for transforming enterprise analytics
- [Contact](https://www.iseyon.com/contact): Request a demo or book a free consultation

## Services

- [Databricks](https://www.iseyon.com/services/cloud-and-platforms/databricks): Lakehouse architecture, Delta Lake, Apache Spark, MLflow
- [Snowflake](https://www.iseyon.com/services/cloud-and-platforms/Snowflake): Cloud data warehouse, data sharing, data marketplace
- [Palantir](https://www.iseyon.com/services/cloud-and-platforms/palantir): Palantir Foundry, AIP, operational intelligence
- [Power BI](https://www.iseyon.com/services/bi-and-analytics/power-bi): Microsoft Power BI dashboards, reports, and analytics
- [Tableau](https://www.iseyon.com/services/bi-and-analytics/Tableau): Visual analytics, interactive dashboards, Tableau Server
- [Strategy (MicroStrategy)](https://www.iseyon.com/services/bi-and-analytics/Strategy): MicroStrategy enterprise analytics and BI platform
- [Azure](https://www.iseyon.com/services/cloud-and-platforms/Azure): Microsoft Azure cloud infrastructure, data engineering, AI/ML
- [AWS](https://www.iseyon.com/services/cloud-and-platforms/aws): Amazon Web Services cloud, data engineering, serverless
- [Anaplan](https://www.iseyon.com/services/cloud-and-platforms/Anaplan): Connected planning, FP&A, supply chain analytics
- [Shopify](https://www.iseyon.com/services/cloud-and-platforms/shopify): Shopify store analytics, data integration, e-commerce BI

## Insights

- [Business Intelligence](https://www.iseyon.com/insights/business-intelligence): BI strategy, dashboards, predictive analytics
- [Internal Applications](https://www.iseyon.com/insights/internal-applications): Workflow automation, decision intelligence platforms
- [Support for Communities](https://www.iseyon.com/insights/support-communities): Community engagement and social impact programs

## Technical Glossary

- BI: Business Intelligence — analyzing data to support business decisions
- AI: Artificial Intelligence — machine-based reasoning and decision-making
- ML: Machine Learning — training models from data to make predictions
- ETL: Extract, Transform, Load — data integration process
- ELT: Extract, Load, Transform — cloud-native data processing
- KPI: Key Performance Indicator — measurable business objective
- Lakehouse: Unified data architecture combining data lake flexibility with data warehouse query performance
- GEO: Generative Engine Optimization — optimizing content for AI search and answer generation
- FP&A: Financial Planning and Analysis — budgeting and forecasting workflows
- CAGR: Compound Annual Growth Rate — year-over-year growth rate over a period

- All content © 2026 Iseyon Analytics

- Attribution required for content reuse
- Contact info@iseyon.com for commercial licensing
- AI training: Allowed with attribution

## Optional: Content Quality Signals

- Schema.org structured data (JSON-LD) on all pages
- E-E-A-T signals: expert-authored, organizational authority, publication dates
- Authoritative citations to academic and industry sources (Stanford HAI, MIT Sloan, Gartner, McKinsey)
- Multilingual support: en, en-US, en-IN
- Content freshness: blog updated weekly, service pages updated monthly
